2603.19880.title: What If Consensus Lies? Selective-Complementary Reinforcement Learning at Test Time
2603.19880.paper_summary: Test-Time Reinforcement Learning (TTRL) enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance reasoning capabilities on unlabeled test streams by deriving pseudo-rewards from majority voting consensus. However, existing TTRL methods rely exclusively on positive pseudo-labeling strategies. Such reliance becomes vulnerable under challenging scenarios where answer distributions are highly dispersed, resulting in weak consensus that inadvertently reinforces incorrect trajectories as supervision signals. In this paper, we propose SCRL (Selective-Complementary Reinforcement Learning), a robust test-time reinforcement learning framework that effectively mitigates label noise amplification. SCRL develops Selective Positive Pseudo-Labeling, which enforces strict consensus criteria to filter unreliable majorities. Complementarily, SCRL introduces Entropy-Gated Negative Pseudo-Labeling, the first negative supervision mechanism in TTRL, to reliably prune incorrect trajectories based on generation uncertainty. Extensive experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SCRL achieves substantial improvements over baselines, while maintaining robust generalization and training stability under constrained rollout budgets. Our code is available at https://github.com/Jasper-Yan/SCRL.
2603.19880.paper_summary_zh: 測試時強化學習（TTRL）使大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠通過從多數投票共識中推導偽獎勵來增強在未標記測試流上的推理能力。<lb/>然而，現有的 TTRL 方法完全依賴於正面偽標記策略。<lb/>這種依賴在答案分佈高度分散的挑戰場景下變得脆弱，導致弱共識，無意中強化了不正確的軌跡作為監督信號。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了 SCRL（選擇性補充強化學習），這是一個穩健的測試時強化學習框架，有效減輕標籤噪聲放大。<lb/>SCRL 開發了選擇性正偽標記，強制執行嚴格的共識標準以過濾不可靠的多數。<lb/>作為補充，SCRL 引入了熵閘負偽標記，這是 TTRL 中首個負監督機制，能夠根據生成不確定性可靠地修剪不正確的軌跡。<lb/>在多個推理基準上的廣泛實驗表明，SCRL 在基準上實現了顯著的改進，同時在受限的展開預算下保持穩健的泛化和訓練穩定性。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/Jasper-Yan/SCRL 獲得。
2603.19880.author: Dong Yan et.al.
2603.19880.authors: Dong Yan, Jian Liang, Yanbo Wang, Shuo Lu, Ran He, Tieniu Tan
